name: Silk Evening Gown
description: A stunning silk evening gown that drapes beautifully. Perfect for galas, formal dinners, and special occasions. Features a flattering A-line silhouette with delicate hand-finished seams.

name: Cashmere Wrap Blouse
description: Luxuriously soft cashmere blend wrap blouse. The perfect balance of comfort and sophistication for both office and evening wear.

name: Tailored Wool Trousers
description: Impeccably tailored wool-blend trousers with a modern slim fit. Features pressed creases and a comfortable high-rise waist.

name: Italian Leather Handbag
description: Handcrafted Italian leather handbag with gold-tone hardware. Spacious interior with multiple compartments. A timeless investment piece.

name: Double-Breasted Blazer
description: A power piece. This double-breasted blazer features peak lapels, gold-tone buttons, and a structured shoulder for a commanding silhouette.

name: Pleated Midi Skirt
description: Flowing pleated midi skirt in a rich satin finish. Moves beautifully with every step and pairs perfectly with our cashmere blouses.

name: Satin Camisole Top
description: Delicate satin camisole with adjustable straps and a cowl neckline. Layer under blazers or wear alone for an effortlessly elegant look.

name: Pearl Drop Earrings
description: Elegant freshwater pearl drop earrings set in 18k gold-plated sterling silver. A classic accessory that elevates any outfit.

name: Velvet Cocktail Dress
description: Rich velvet cocktail dress with a flattering V-neckline and three-quarter sleeves. The perfect choice for holiday parties and evening events.

name: Merino Wool Turtleneck
description: Ultra-fine merino wool turtleneck in a relaxed fit. Incredibly soft against the skin with excellent temperature regulation.

name: Leather Wrap Belt
description: Supple leather wrap belt with a brushed gold buckle. Designed to cinch the waist and add structure to flowy dresses and oversized tops.

name: Cashmere Overcoat
description: A luxurious full-length cashmere overcoat. Features a classic notch lapel, two-button closure, and satin-lined interior. The ultimate winter statement piece.

name: Floral Wrap Dress
description: A beautiful floral-print wrap dress in flowing chiffon. Features a self-tie waist and flutter sleeves for a romantic, feminine silhouette.

name: High-Waist Palazzo Pants
description: Wide-leg palazzo pants with a flattering high waist. Made from a fluid crepe fabric that creates an elegant drape and elongates the silhouette.

name: Silk Scarf Collection
description: Hand-printed silk scarf featuring an exclusive artistic design. Can be worn as a neck scarf, headband, or tied to your favourite handbag.

name: Cropped Tweed Jacket
description: A modern take on the classic tweed jacket. Cropped silhouette with frayed edges, metallic thread accents, and jewel-tone buttons.

name: Lace Evening Top
description: Exquisite lace overlay evening top with a scalloped hem. Features a built-in camisole lining for comfort and modesty.

name: Sequin Mini Dress
description: Show-stopping sequin mini dress that catches light from every angle. Features long sleeves and a relaxed shift silhouette for comfortable glamour.

name: Suede Ankle Boots
description: Italian suede ankle boots with a sculpted block heel. Features a side zip closure and a pointed toe for a sleek, modern profile.

name: Quilted Puffer Vest
description: Lightweight quilted puffer vest with a luxe matte finish. Features a stand collar, hidden zip closure, and side pockets. Perfect for layering.
